# GitHub topics for this repo

Settings → About → Topics. Aim for **20 topics** (max GitHub allows). Below is the recommended list, ordered by discovery weight.

```
multilogin
multilogin-x
antidetect
antidetect-browser
cloud-phone
multi-account
multi-accounting
mmo
playwright
puppeteer
selenium
mlx-api
openapi
fingerprint
proxy-management
account-farming
warmup-scheduler
github-profile
awesome-list
documentation
```

## About blurb (160 char max recommended)

> Open-source Multilogin partner hub: 90 API endpoints, OpenAPI spec, Swagger UI, 40 cookbooks, 30 country playbooks, 16 comparisons, CLI & Docker.

## Website

Set the GitHub repo website to:

```
https://multilogin-labs.github.io/multilogin-labs/
```

## Social preview image

Generate a 1280×640 PNG (Settings → Social preview) using the spec in [docs/og-image-spec.md](../docs/og-image-spec.md).
